cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 孩子今晚有点发烧，想先去店里看看退烧药，这会儿还能过去吗？

mustInclude: anchor the reply in role and timing
guide toward a clear next step without overselling
mustAvoid: pretending the right product is already obvious

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 这周末返乡，想给家里先备点常用药，你们这两天有时间帮我看看吗？

mustInclude: recognize it as a serious prep inquiry
ask for family role, timing, and rough scope
mustAvoid: assuming every family stock-up is the same

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 晚上还有药师吗？我想先问清楚怎么备药，不想乱买。

mustInclude: move toward role-specific and evidence-based clarification

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 今晚能不能先送点止咳和退烧的过来？家里老人孩子都要用。

mustInclude: state that pickup or limited delivery depends on store and timing
guide toward the safest next step
